# EchoJS Documentation Site (apps/docs)

> Machine-readable rules for AI assistants editing this repo.

## Stack

- EchoJS: @echojs/framework, @echojs/hyperdom, @echojs/router, @echojs/reactivity, @echojs/query, @echojs/i18n
- UI: hyperdom + tailwind-variants (`tv()`), no React
- Content: markdown under `apps/docs/src/content/`

## Mandatory pattern (logic vs view)

NEVER mix state/effects and markup in one file.

1. **Model** — `createModel` from `@echojs/hyperdom` in `model/*.model.ts`
   - Signals, effects, queries, actions, derived state
2. **View** — `createView` in `ui/*.view.ts` — ONLY presentation (hyperdom tree)
3. **Wire** — `bindModelView(createXModel, XView)` or `bindModelViewWith(props, (p) => createXModel(p), XView)` from `shared/ui/bind-model-view.ts`
4. **Types** — `types/*.types.ts` (VM, props)
5. **Constants** — `constants/*.constants.ts` (static copy, config arrays)
6. **Public API** — `index.ts` exports the component function

## Folder layout

```
pages/<feature>/
  constants/
  types/
  model/
  ui/
  index.ts
  <feature>.page.ts    # route: SEO + bindModelView

widgets/<name>/
  model/
  ui/
  types/               # if needed
  index.ts
```

## Pages

- Route: `createRouteView({ view: () => bindModelView(createModel, View) })`
- SEO: `applySeo()` in page or model effect — not in view

## Widgets with props

```ts
export const createFooModel = (props: FooProps) =>
  createModel((): FooVM => ({ props, ... }), "FooModel");

export const Foo = (props: FooProps): Child =>
  bindModelViewWith(props, createFooModel, FooView);
```

## Do not

- Export `(): Child =>` views without `createView`
- Put `signal()`, `effect()`, or `createQuery` in `.view.ts`
- Put business logic in `constants/` or `types/`

## Docs content

- New doc page: add markdown under `src/content/` + entry in `shared/content/nav.ts` (or `agents-nav.ts`)

Full guide: /docs/agents/agents
